title: Nerd happy ghasts
description: It makes all happy ghasts nerds!!! 🤓
body:
**This pack makes all the happy ghasts nerds!!! They get two cute protruding teeth and pimples on their cheeks.**

---
![so happy!!! so nerd!!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d22d67c238fa5cb46eaf035119a52357449024c8.png)

**It also affects their baby version.**
